subcodes.first_line: O noble one, beauteous in character, how blessed art thou, who art inebriated with the wine of the Covenant! Blessed art thou, for the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جلیل جمیل الاخلاق خوشا بحال تو که سرمست جام میثاقی خوشا بحال تو که آتش
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
